personality_one_liner: A fast, high-contrast command center prioritizing real-time sensor metrics and live operational clarity.

spacing.rule: Generous intentional padding around components, strict adherence to safe areas. Cards use single-column layout filling horizontal space.

do's: Avoid glass entirely for this Dark-First Utility profile to maintain high contrast and operational speed.
Use solid surfaceSecondary with sharp sm radius instead of blurred backgrounds.
dont's: No frosted glass or heavy blur on dense data screens.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Live operational surface for monitoring ESP32 metrics at a glance.

states.error: Full screen error state with 'Connection Failed' message and a primary Retry CTA.

screens.layout: Screen Root: Single scrolling column. Top: Hero Connection Card using the dark matte texture image with a gradient-to-dark scrim, displaying connection status pill (success/error dot + text) and 'Last updated' timestamp. Below Hero: 3 stacked cards for Temperature, Humidity, and Brightness. Each card uses `surfaceSecondary`, 1pt `border` (no shadows), and a `brandTertiary` tinted square for the Phosphor icon. Typography in cards pairs `Barlow Condensed` for the values at `2xl` with `DM Sans` for labels. Bottom: sticky FAB (Floating Action Button) to open Settings, placed above the home indicator.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Configuration of ESP32 connection details and refresh interval.

states.error: Inline validation error under the input field.

screens.layout: Modal or Stack push. Single column form. Input for 'Endpoint URL' with top label. Segmented control for 'Refresh Interval' (2s, 5s, 10s). Footer: Sticky primary CTA button 'Save Settings' anchored to the bottom (respecting safe area and keyboard avoiding view). Button uses solid `brandPrimary` with no gradients.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility DARK guidelines.
Do not use time data from the ESP32. Generate the 'Last updated' timestamp locally on the device upon receiving the payload.
The Hero connection card MUST have the geometric texture background image with a vertical gradient scrim overlay (transparent to dark `surface`) to ensure text readability.
Feature icons (temperature, humidity, brightness) should sit inside a `brandTertiary` tinted rounded square.
No blue, indigo, or purple colors. Rely on Ember/Signal Orange (`#FF4D00`) for the primary brand.

Restrict typography font size to maximum 24 (`2xl`). Emphasize the metric values by using the condensed font (`Barlow Condensed`) with a 500 weight against the `onSurface` color, contrasted by smaller UI labels.
Implement manual pull-to-refresh as well as the configurable auto-refresh loop (setInterval).
